reasoning: Featured Japan Heritage story 051 (森林鉄道から日本一のゆずロード) directly covers 中芸地域 5 villages with authoritative 文化庁 data — RULE E applies, boosting intent and specificity by 1. However the tool was called without a keyword filter, yielding 651 matches truncated at 500; the MAFF GI shown is 物部ゆず (Kami City, different region from 中芸), and scraped items include a Buddhist temple and a travel-itinerary article misclassified as regional_dish. The 中芸ゆず MAFF GI record (if registered) may be buried in the 151 truncated items — hence Retrieval Failure as primary category per RULE B.

improvement_hint: Pass keyword='ゆず' or municipality filter covering 奈半利町/田野町/安田町/北川村/馬路村 to avoid 651-item truncation. Alternatively, register a canonical_yuzu_chugei cluster so the featured block surfaces the correct GI alongside the heritage story.
